app_release_notes: v0.14.9 - Loadscope is now ONE window. A new left-side menu (Import Data / Rifle & Setup / Range & DOPE / Results / Pocket Card) replaces hunting through menus - your import screen, the Rifle & Setup form, and the Range & DOPE form all live in one place with Save built in. The Workbook menu items still work too. Foundation for the polished single-window app; more panels (live Results, Card) coming next.
